trigger: 女儿拒绝沈家提亲后,父亲不理解女儿为何刁难好姻缘

appearance_delta.face: 眉头深锁,满脸困惑不解
appearance_delta.body: 身体前倾,试图理解女儿
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 紧锁的眉头,疑惑的眼神

visual_reference: confused middle-aged Chinese father, deeply furrowed brows, puzzled expression, graying hair slightly disheveled, brown casual robe, leaning forward with concern, traditional Chinese interior, warm lighting, protective but bewildered
emotional_tone: 困惑不解但依然关爱女儿
